name.description: The resource name of the snapshot. The name must be unique within the specified instance. The name must be 1-63 characters long, and comply with RFC1035. Specifically, the name must be 1-63 characters long and match the regular expression `[a-z]([-a-z0-9]*[a-z0-9])?` which means the first character must be a lowercase letter, and all following characters must be a dash, lowercase letter, or digit, except the last character, which cannot be a dash.

location.description: The name of the location of the instance. This can be a region for ENTERPRISE tier instances.

instance.description: The resource name of the filestore instance.

description.description: A description of the snapshot with 2048 characters or less. Requests with longer descriptions will be rejected.

labels.description: Resource labels to represent user-provided metadata. **Note**: This field is non-authoritative, and will only manage the labels present in your configuration. Please refer to the field `effective_labels` for all of the labels present on the resource.

project.description: If it is not provided, the provider project is used.
